title: Connectomic analysis reveals an interneuron with an integral role in the retinal circuit for night vision
abstract: Night vision depends on the rod bipolar cell pathway. Using connectomic reconstruction from serial block-face EM, we identify the major inhibitory input to the AII amacrine cell, revealing an interneuron with an integral role in the night vision circuit.
notes: Connectomics-driven discovery of a key interneuron in the night vision pathway.
